docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COBB, FRANCES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, SUSAN C/O WORKSHOP $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,650.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00 SERVED OCT-17-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, SUSAN C/O WORKSHOP
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, SUSAN C/O WORKSHOP HEARING SET FOR MAY-22-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER FOR APPEARANCE AND EXAMINATION (SC-133 & SC-134) FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COBB, FRANCES SERVED APR-20-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, SUSAN C/O WORKSHOP

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2017 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-26-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR FRANCES COBB IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SUSAN KIM IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: OEX DISCHARGED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY COBB, FRANCES AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, SUSAN C/O WORKSHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF FRANCES COBB. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SUSAN KIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION BENCH LETTER ISSUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT SUSAN KIM, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, SUSAN C/O WORKSHOP
